positive: A cosmic forest scene where bioluminescent flora illuminates ancient, stylized trees. The scene features floating geometric islands and swirling nebula patterns in the background. Dominant colors are deep indigo, vibrant electric blue, neon cyan, and soft glowing magenta. The style is a fusion of psychedelic art and Art Deco illustration, characterized by strong, clean silhouettes, high contrast, and intricate, symmetrical patterns suitable for apparel printing. Cinematic lighting, deep focus, crisp lines, vector-like clarity. Central composition, mystical, ethereal.
